description_long: This house features a boxy, modernist design with a flat roof and a strong emphasis on geometric lines. The exterior is clad in a mix of dark brown brick and white paneling, creating a striking contrast. Large rectangular windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front facade is defined by a prominent staircase leading up to a raised entryway, flanked by a balcony and railings. The structure appears to have two main stories, with open floor plans visible through the window and wall cutouts. A driveway and garage are integrated into the ground level, enhancing its urban residential character.
description: A modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof, dark brick and white paneling, large windows, and a prominent front staircase with balcony. Features an integrated garage and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main staircase, entryway, balcony, and garage doors beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facade, side balcony, and driveway extension.
description_view_2: Rear view with additional windows, back entry, and a clear view of the driveway layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, side balcony, and window arrangement.
attribute_entryway_design: Central staircase leading to a raised entry with a balcony, flanked by railings and a prominent front door.
